goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'taj tandoori'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '8 people' at '19:30' on 'sunday'.
If the booking fails how about '18:30'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:45' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called taj tandoori
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 19:30 on sunday
If the booking fails how about 18:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 15:45 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time
